headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Abbott Laboratories, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $138 to $134.
